title: BWC Request: Eminem's Ex-Wife Kim Scott DUI Arrest — Bizarre Bodycam Interaction

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Public Records Request — Body-Worn Camera Footage: Eminem's Ex-Wife Kim Scott DUI Arrest

To Whom It May Concern,

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) / applicable state public records law, I am requesting access to the following public records:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashcam footage, and any other audio or video recordings related to the following incident:

Case/Incident: Eminem's Ex-Wife Kim Scott DUI Arrest — Bizarre Bodycam Interaction
Date of Incident: February 23, 2026
Agency: TMZ
Summary: Kim Scott, ex-wife of rapper Eminem, arrested for DUI in Michigan February 2026. TMZ obtained bodycam footage showing bizarre interaction with police officers during the stop....

This request includes:
1. All body-worn camera footage from any officers involved in the incident
2. All dashcam / in-car camera footage from responding vehicles
3. Any booking room, interview room, or holding area footage related to this incident
4. Any associated arrest reports or incident reports (if not exempt)

I request that this footage be provided electronically if possible (via download link, USB, or email attachment).

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance. If any portion of this request is denied, please cite the specific statutory exemption being claimed.

Thank you for your assistance.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tom Nash, a citizen of Virginia, in coordination with Sam O.

title: Response to Medical Emergencies - West Virginia Division of Corrections

communications.subject: West Virginia Freedom of Information Act Request: Response to Medical Emergencies - West Virginia Division of Corrections
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the West Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All written policies and procedures of the West Virginia Division of Corrections governing responses to medical emergencies, including policies related to the transport of incarcerated individuals to community hospitals or other external medical facilities.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Sophie Choong
